title: Baseline Benign: Learn What Normal Looks Like
learning_objectives: Recognize that not every event stream should create an alert
Get comfortable filtering on a single run ID
Learn what a quiet baseline looks like before triaging real alerts
triage_questions: Do you see any alerts tied to this run?
What kinds of normal activity are present in the dataset?
Which fields help you prove this is routine activity instead of malicious behavior?
evidence_to_check: Review the mix of authentication, web, process, DNS, and container events
Confirm that alert exports for this run are empty or stay quiet
hints: Start by checking whether the run produced any alerts at all.
Look at the messages and the host names. They read like routine admin and service activity.
This case is about learning the baseline, not chasing a detection.
escalation_guidance: Do not escalate. Use this run to build intuition for what clean background activity looks like.
